panels.title: Host monitorati
panels.description: Numero di host resman visibili nel perimetro filtrato per cluster, ambiente e ruolo.

targets.expr: count(count by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (resman_cpu_total_usage_percent{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}))

panels.title: Utenti limitati
panels.description: Utenti attualmente soggetti a limite CPU nel perimetro filtrato.

targets.expr: sum(resman_limited_users_count{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}) or vector(0)

panels.title: CPU media
panels.description: Media della percentuale CPU per ruolo e host. 100% indica tutta la CPU logica dell host.

targets.expr: avg(resman_cpu_total_usage_percent{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"})

panels.title: RAM media
panels.description: Media della RAM usata rispetto alla RAM totale dei ruoli e host filtrati.

targets.expr: avg(100 * resman_memory_usage_megabytes{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"} / resman_memory_total_megabytes{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"})

panels.title: Attivazioni 1h
panels.description: Numero di attivazioni limiti nell ultima ora.

targets.expr: sum(increase(resman_limits_activated_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[1h])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Errori 1h
panels.description: Errori registrati da resman nell ultima ora.

targets.expr: sum(increase(resman_errors_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[1h])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Load average per sistema
panels.description: Load average esposto da resman per ogni server_role e host.

targets.expr: resman_system_load_average{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}

panels.title: CPU per sistema
panels.description: Percentuale CPU totale per ruolo e host. Il 100% rappresenta tutti i core logici disponibili sull host.

targets.expr: resman_cpu_total_usage_percent{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}

panels.title: RAM per sistema
panels.description: Percentuale RAM usata per ruolo e host.

targets.expr: 100 * resman_memory_usage_megabytes{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"} / resman_memory_total_megabytes{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}

panels.title: IO per sistema
panels.description: Throughput read/write per cluster, environment, server_role e host. Usa le label aggiunte da Prometheus allo scrape e mostra 0 quando il counter esiste ma non ha incremento recente.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (rate(resman_user_io_read_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}[5m]) or (resman_user_io_read_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"} * 0))

sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (rate(resman_user_io_write_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}[5m]) or (resman_user_io_write_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"} * 0))

panels.title: Utenti limitati
panels.description: Elenco operativo degli utenti con limite CPU attivo.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username) (resman_user_cpu_limited{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"} == 1)

panels.title: Top utenti CPU
panels.description: Utenti con maggiore consumo CPU nel perimetro filtrato.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username) (resman_user_cpu_usage_percent{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}))

panels.title: Top utenti RAM
panels.description: Utenti con maggiore memoria residente aggregata.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username) (resman_user_memory_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}))

panels.title: Top utenti IO
panels.description: Utenti con maggiore throughput IO read+write.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username) (rate(resman_user_io_read_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(resman_user_io_write_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top utenti per processi
panels.description: Utenti con piu processi attivi. Verde sotto 10, arancione da 10 a 30, rosso sopra 30.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username) (resman_user_process_count{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"}))

panels.title: Pattern autodetect
panels.description: Confidence dei pattern AUTODETECT_PATTERNS rilevati per utente.

targets.expr: topk(30, max by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, username, pattern) (resman_user_workload_pattern_confidence{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname", username=~"$username"} * 100))

panels.title: Attivazioni e rimozioni limiti
panels.description: Quando resman applica o rimuove limiti CPU.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (increase(resman_limits_activated_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (increase(resman_limits_deactivated_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Cicli di controllo per trigger
panels.description: Origine dei cicli di controllo: polling, PSI o altri trigger registrati.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, trigger) (increase(resman_control_cycle_triggers_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Eventi PSI
panels.description: Eventi PSI ricevuti dal kernel, separati per tipo e scope.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, type, scope) (increase(resman_psi_events_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Ultimo evento PSI
panels.description: Timestamp Unix dell ultimo evento PSI ricevuto per tipo/scope.

targets.expr: max by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, type, scope) (resman_psi_last_event_timestamp_seconds{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"})

panels.title: Durata ciclo controllo p95
panels.description: Latenza p95 del ciclo di controllo resman.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (rate(resman_control_cycle_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[5m])))

panels.title: Durata raccolta metriche p95
panels.description: Latenza p95 della raccolta metriche.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, cluster, environment, server_role, hostname) (rate(resman_metrics_collection_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[5m])))

panels.title: Errori per componente
panels.description: Errori incrementali raggruppati per componente e tipo.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, environment, server_role, hostname, component, error_type) (increase(resman_errors_total{cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", server_role=~"$server_role", hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__rate_interval]))
